pricing_tier.quote_span: Appliance pricing is tiered by total unit quantity ordered under this SOW: 1 to 10 units: $12,000 per unit; 11 to 25 units: $10,500 per unit; 26 to 50 units: $9,000 per unit

discount_threshold.quote_span: Orders paid in full within that window receive a five percent (5%) discount off the total invoice, applied as a one-time credit; this discount applies only to this single purchase and does not affect future orders.

msa_sow_linkage.referenced_document: Exhibit C to the Master Services Agreement between Cascadia Cloud Services LLC and Fernway Logistics Group
msa_sow_linkage.order_of_precedence_note: This SOW incorporates the MSA's general terms by reference; in the event of conflict specific to the equipment described herein, this SOW controls.
msa_sow_linkage.quote_span: This Statement of Work ("SOW") is issued under Exhibit C to the Master Services Agreement between Cascadia Cloud Services LLC and Fernway Logistics Group (the "MSA").
